title: Cuneiform Tablet #0333: Old Babylonian Marriage Contract
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a marriage contract document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a marriage contract document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Babylonian period. Marriage Contract document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records marriage contract matters typical of Old Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
